name: approval-platform
description: Production-oriented approval platform built on Flowable

scripts.mobile:install: pnpm mobile:bootstrap && pnpm -C .upstream/unibest install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm -C .upstream/unibest init-baseFiles
scripts.mobile:dev:h5: pnpm mobile:bootstrap && pnpm -C .upstream/unibest init-baseFiles && pnpm -C .upstream/unibest dev:h5
scripts.mobile:typecheck: pnpm mobile:bootstrap && pnpm -C .upstream/unibest init-baseFiles && pnpm -C .upstream/unibest type-check
scripts.mobile:build:h5: pnpm mobile:bootstrap && pnpm -C .upstream/unibest init-baseFiles && pnpm -C .upstream/unibest build:h5
scripts.mobile:build:weixin: pnpm mobile:bootstrap && pnpm -C .upstream/unibest init-baseFiles && pnpm -C .upstream/unibest build:mp-weixin
